1

Variant Identity

SKU & stock details
What is a variant? Each unique product configuration — e.g. Blue / 8GB / 128GB — is one variant with its own SKU, price and stock. Fill the form and click Save & Add Variant to create it.

Unique identifier. Use UPPERCASE + hyphens. Must be different for every variant.

Price the buyer pays. Hidden when multiple combo values are detected.

Available units for this single variant. Each combination gets its own stock in multi-mode.

2

Variant Attributes

{{ product.category }} — specific properties
Bulk mode: Separate values with commas to create all combinations in one save. Example — Color: Red, Blue  |  RAM: 8GB, 12GB  |  Storage: 128GB, 256GB A pricing popup will appear so you can set price & stock for each combo individually.
{% if attributes %}
{% for ca in attributes %}

Use commas for multiple values — triggers the pricing popup automatically

{% endfor %}
{% else %}
No attributes configured for {{ product.category }} yet. Ask admin to add them via Admin → Category Attributes.
{% endif %}

0 combinations detected — set price & stock for each

3

Variant Images

Slideshow shown when buyer selects this variant
Upload all images for this color / variant group. These become the product image slideshow when the buyer selects this variant on the product page. Supported: JPG, PNG, WEBP, AVIF. Recommended: at least 3 photos per variant.

Click to upload  ·  Multiple files allowed

After saving this variant: You'll come back to this page to add the next variant group (e.g. next color). Repeat until all variant combinations are listed in the Saved Variants table below.
Done — Main Product Page

Set Price & Stock per Combination

Leave Price empty to skip that combination (no variant created in DB). Each combination gets its own stock count.
